reference_bridge.technique: Jaccard similarity on shared OWASP LLM Top 10 references

semantic.technique: Sentence-transformer cosine similarity (all-MiniLM-L6-v2) with prevention-guideline boosting and Z-score normalization

keyword.technique: TF-IDF cosine similarity with domain-specific synonym expansion

function_match.technique: Multiplicative boost (not additive): content * (1 + boost) when control function class is in threat function profile
